title: oxera pulchella
intro: Oxera pulchella, also known as the Pretty Oxera or the New Caledonian oxera, is a flowering plant native to New Caledonia in the Pacific Ocean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxera pulchella include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Oxera pulchella can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
